headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://apis.google.com https://www.googletagmanager.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://lh3.googleusercontent.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.googleapis.com https://oauth2.googleapis.com wss://*.firebaseio.com; frame-src 'self' https://*.firebaseapp.com https://accounts.google.com; frame-ancestors 'self' https://*.firebaseapp.com
